title: Build BlackRoad AI Platform MVP (Full Stack)

result: Built BlackRoad AI Platform MVP - Product #64 DEPLOYED! Live at https://ai-platform.blackroad-hello.pages.dev. Code committed locally (GitHub rate limited, will push later). URGENT MVP DELIVERED!
